variables.input:
fetch dt.entity.host_group
| fields entity.name
| append [data  record(entity.name = "No group assigned")]

1.query:
fetch logs
| filter dt.process_group.detected_name == "IIS" or dt.process_group.detected_name == "IIS app pool CCM Client Notification Proxy Pool" or dt.process_group.detected_name == "IIS app pool CCM Server Framework Pool" or dt.process_group.detected_name == "IIS app pool CCM Windows Auth User Service Pool"
| filter isNotNull(url.path)
| filter http.response.status_code > 299
| summarize HTTP_Status_Count = count(), by: {http.response.status_code}

13.title: Client to Management Authentication
13.query:
fetch logs
| filter dt.process_group.detected_name == "IIS" or dt.process_group.detected_name == "IIS app pool CCM Client Notification Proxy Pool" or dt.process_group.detected_name == "IIS app pool CCM Server Framework Pool" or dt.process_group.detected_name == "IIS app pool CCM Windows Auth User Service Pool"
| filter isNotNull(client.ip) and isNotNull(url.path)
| filter startsWith(url.path,"/SimpleAuthWebService") or startsWith(url.path,"/DssAuthWebService")
| summarize Total_Client_Requests = count(), avg(duration), by:{http.response.status_code}

14.title: Client to Management Authentication - Request Duration
14.query:
fetch logs
| filter dt.process_group.detected_name == "IIS" or dt.process_group.detected_name == "IIS app pool CCM Client Notification Proxy Pool" or dt.process_group.detected_name == "IIS app pool CCM Server Framework Pool" or dt.process_group.detected_name == "IIS app pool CCM Windows Auth User Service Pool"
| filter isNotNull(client.ip) and isNotNull(url.path)
| filter startsWith(url.path,"/SimpleAuthWebService") or startsWith(url.path,"/DssAuthWebService")
| filter http.response.status_code == 200
| makeTimeseries duration=avg(duration)

21.title: 🛑 Problems
21.query:
fetch dt.davis.problems
| filter dt.davis.is_duplicate==false
| fieldsAdd entityIds=arrayConcat(root_cause_entity_id,affected_entity_ids)[]
| fieldsAdd dt.entity.application = if(startsWith(entityIds[], "APPLICATION-"), entityIds[]),dt.entity.cloud_application = if(startsWith(entityIds[], "CLOUD_APPLICATION-"), entityIds[]), dt.entity.cloud_application_instance = if(startsWith(entityIds[], "CLOUD_APPLICATION_INSTANCE-"), entityIds[]), dt.entity.kubernetes_cluster = if(startsWith(entityIds[], "KUBERNETES_CLUSTER-"), entityIds[]),dt.entity.kubernetes_node = if(startsWith(entityIds[], "KUBERNETES_NODE-"), entityIds[]),dt.entity.service = if(startsWith(entityIds[], "SERVICE-"), entityIds[]),dt.entity.process_group = if(startsWith(entityIds[], "PROCESS_GROUP-"), entityIds[]),dt.entity.process_group_instance = if(startsWith(entityIds[], "PROCESS_GROUP_INSTANCE-"), entityIds[]),dt.entity.host = if(startsWith(entityIds[], "HOST-"), entityIds[])
| fieldsAdd dt.entity.application = arrayRemoveNulls(dt.entity.application), dt.entity.cloud_application = arrayRemoveNulls(dt.entity.cloud_application), dt.entity.cloud_application_instance = arrayRemoveNulls(dt.entity.cloud_application_instance), dt.entity.kubernetes_cluster = arrayRemoveNulls(dt.entity.kubernetes_cluster),dt.entity.kubernetes_node = arrayRemoveNulls(dt.entity.kubernetes_node),dt.entity.service = arrayRemoveNulls(dt.entity.service), dt.entity.process_group = arrayRemoveNulls(dt.entity.process_group), dt.entity.process_group_instance = arrayRemoveNulls(dt.entity.process_group_instance),dt.entity.host = arrayRemoveNulls(dt.entity.host)
| fieldsAdd dt.entity.application = dt.entity.application[0], dt.entity.cloud_application = dt.entity.cloud_application[0], dt.entity.cloud_application_instance = dt.entity.cloud_application_instance[0], dt.entity.kubernetes_cluster=dt.entity.kubernetes_cluster[0], dt.entity.kubernetes_node=dt.entity.kubernetes_node[0],dt.entity.service=dt.entity.service[0],dt.entity.process_group=dt.entity.process_group[0],dt.entity.process_group_instance=dt.entity.process_group_instance[0],dt.entity.host=dt.entity.host[0]
| fieldsAdd `Affected`=concat(coalesce(entityName(dt.entity.application), entityName(dt.entity.service), entityName(dt.entity.process_group), entityName(dt.entity.process_group_instance), entityName(dt.entity.host), entityName(dt.entity.cloud_application), entityName(dt.entity.cloud_application_instance), entityName(dt.entity.kubernetes_node), entityName(dt.entity.kubernetes_cluster), dt.entity.process_group_instance), if(arraySize(affected_entity_ids) > 1, concat(" + ", arraySize(affected_entity_ids) - 1), else: ""))
| fieldsAdd `Affected Count`=arraySize(affected_entity_ids)
| fieldsAdd severity=if(
  event.category=="AVAILABILITY", 1, else: if(
  event.category=="ERROR", 2, else: if(
  event.category=="SLOWDOWN", 3, else: if(
  event.category=="RESOURCE_CONTENTION", 4, else: if(
  event.category=="CUSTOM_ALERT", 2))))),
  Duration=coalesce(event.end-event.start, now()-event.start),
  `Affected Users`=coalesce(dt.davis.affected_users_count, "-")
| sort Duration, severity, display_id
| expand affected_entity_ids

| dedup display_id
| fieldsAdd display_id = concat("[", display_id, "](","/ui/apps/dynatrace.davis.problems/problem/", event.id, ")")
| fields Start=event.start, Duration, Status=event.status, ID=display_id, Severity=event.category, Name = event.name, Affected, `Affected Count`, `Affected Users`,`Root Cause`=root_cause_entity_name, Description=event.description, event.id, dt.entity.application, dt.entity.cloud_application, dt.entity.cloud_application_instance, dt.entity.host, dt.entity.kubernetes_cluster, dt.entity.kubernetes_node, dt.entity.host_group, dt.entity.process_group, dt.entity.process_group_instance, event.start, event.end
| sort Status, Severity, Start
| join [fetch dt.entity.host
], on:{left[dt.entity.host] == right[id]}
| fieldsAdd hostGroupName = if(isNull(dt.entity.host_group),  "No group assigned", else: dt.entity.host_group)
| filter in(hostGroupName, $HostGroups)

22.title: Problems
22.query:
fetch dt.davis.problems
| filter dt.davis.is_duplicate==false
| fieldsAdd entityIds=arrayConcat(root_cause_entity_id,affected_entity_ids)[]
| fieldsAdd dt.entity.application = if(startsWith(entityIds[], "APPLICATION-"), entityIds[]),dt.entity.cloud_application = if(startsWith(entityIds[], "CLOUD_APPLICATION-"), entityIds[]), dt.entity.cloud_application_instance = if(startsWith(entityIds[], "CLOUD_APPLICATION_INSTANCE-"), entityIds[]), dt.entity.kubernetes_cluster = if(startsWith(entityIds[], "KUBERNETES_CLUSTER-"), entityIds[]),dt.entity.kubernetes_node = if(startsWith(entityIds[], "KUBERNETES_NODE-"), entityIds[]),dt.entity.service = if(startsWith(entityIds[], "SERVICE-"), entityIds[]),dt.entity.process_group = if(startsWith(entityIds[], "PROCESS_GROUP-"), entityIds[]),dt.entity.process_group_instance = if(startsWith(entityIds[], "PROCESS_GROUP_INSTANCE-"), entityIds[]),dt.entity.host = if(startsWith(entityIds[], "HOST-"), entityIds[])
| fieldsAdd dt.entity.application = arrayRemoveNulls(dt.entity.application), dt.entity.cloud_application = arrayRemoveNulls(dt.entity.cloud_application), dt.entity.cloud_application_instance = arrayRemoveNulls(dt.entity.cloud_application_instance), dt.entity.kubernetes_cluster = arrayRemoveNulls(dt.entity.kubernetes_cluster),dt.entity.kubernetes_node = arrayRemoveNulls(dt.entity.kubernetes_node),dt.entity.service = arrayRemoveNulls(dt.entity.service), dt.entity.process_group = arrayRemoveNulls(dt.entity.process_group), dt.entity.process_group_instance = arrayRemoveNulls(dt.entity.process_group_instance),dt.entity.host = arrayRemoveNulls(dt.entity.host)
| fieldsAdd dt.entity.application = dt.entity.application[0], dt.entity.cloud_application = dt.entity.cloud_application[0], dt.entity.cloud_application_instance = dt.entity.cloud_application_instance[0], dt.entity.kubernetes_cluster=dt.entity.kubernetes_cluster[0], dt.entity.kubernetes_node=dt.entity.kubernetes_node[0],dt.entity.service=dt.entity.service[0],dt.entity.process_group=dt.entity.process_group[0],dt.entity.process_group_instance=dt.entity.process_group_instance[0],dt.entity.host=dt.entity.host[0]
| fieldsAdd `Affected`=concat(coalesce(entityName(dt.entity.application), entityName(dt.entity.service), entityName(dt.entity.process_group), entityName(dt.entity.process_group_instance), entityName(dt.entity.host), entityName(dt.entity.cloud_application), entityName(dt.entity.cloud_application_instance), entityName(dt.entity.kubernetes_node), entityName(dt.entity.kubernetes_cluster), dt.entity.process_group_instance), if(arraySize(affected_entity_ids) > 1, concat(" + ", arraySize(affected_entity_ids) - 1), else: ""))
| fieldsAdd `Affected Count`=arraySize(affected_entity_ids)
| fieldsAdd severity=if(
  event.category=="AVAILABILITY", 1, else: if(
  event.category=="ERROR", 2, else: if(
  event.category=="SLOWDOWN", 3, else: if(
  event.category=="RESOURCE_CONTENTION", 4, else: if(
  event.category=="CUSTOM_ALERT", 2))))),
  Duration=coalesce(event.end-event.start, now()-event.start),
  `Affected Users`=coalesce(dt.davis.affected_users_count, "-")
| sort Duration, severity, display_id
| expand affected_entity_ids

| dedup display_id
| fieldsAdd display_id = concat("[", display_id, "](", $tenant, "/ui/apps/dynatrace.classic.problems/#problems/problemdetails;pid=", event.id, ")")
| fields Start=event.start, Duration, Status=event.status, ID=display_id, Severity=event.category, Name = event.name, Affected, `Affected Count`, `Affected Users`,`Root Cause`=root_cause_entity_name, Description=event.description, event.id, dt.entity.application, dt.entity.cloud_application, dt.entity.cloud_application_instance, dt.entity.host, dt.entity.kubernetes_cluster, dt.entity.kubernetes_node, dt.entity.host_group, dt.entity.process_group, dt.entity.process_group_instance, event.start, event.end
| sort Status, Severity, Start
| join [fetch dt.entity.host
], on:{left[dt.entity.host] == right[id]}
| fieldsAdd hostGroupName = if(isNull(dt.entity.host_group),  "No group assigned", else: dt.entity.host_group)
| summarize countDistinct(ID)

23.title: Hosts by monitoring modes

24.title: Hosts availability
24.query:
fetch dt.entity.host
| fieldsAdd hostGroupName = if(isNull(hostGroupName),  "No group assigned", else: hostGroupName)
| fieldsAdd state
| fieldsRemove entity.name
| fieldsRemove id
| filterOut isNull(state)
| sort state asc
| summarize count(),
          by:{
               state
             }

25.title: Avg Memory Usage / host >= 90%
25.query:
timeseries  mem_usg=avg(dt.host.memory.usage), by: { host.name, dt.entity.host, dt.entity.host_group }
| fieldsAdd dt.entity.host_group.name = entityName(dt.entity.host_group)  
| fieldsAdd hostGroupName = if(isNull( dt.entity.host_group.name),  "No group assigned", else:  dt.entity.host_group.name)
| fieldsAdd mem_avg = arrayAvg(mem_usg) 
| fields host.name, mem_avg, dt.entity.host
| fieldsAdd host.name = "masked_hostname"
| sort mem_avg desc
//| filter mem_avg >= 90

26.title: Avg Memory Usage / host
26.query:
timeseries  mem_usg=avg(dt.host.memory.usage), by: { host.name, dt.entity.host, dt.entity.host_group }
| fieldsAdd dt.entity.host_group.name = entityName(dt.entity.host_group)  
| fieldsAdd hostGroupName = if(isNull( dt.entity.host_group.name),  "No group assigned", else:  dt.entity.host_group.name)
| fieldsAdd mem_avg = arrayAvg(mem_usg) 
| fields host.name, mem_avg, dt.entity.host
| sort mem_avg desc

27.title: Avg Disk usage % / host
27.query:
timeseries  disk_usg=avg(dt.host.disk.used.percent), by: { host.name, dt.entity.host }
| fieldsAdd disk_avg = arrayAvg(disk_usg) 
| fields host.name, disk_avg, dt.entity.host
| fieldsAdd host.name = "masked_hostname"
| sort disk_avg desc

28.title: Network traffic across all hosts

leftYAxisSettings.label: NIC bytes received • NIC bytes sent on host

29.title: Total traffic
29.query:
timeseries by:{dt.entity.host, dt.entity.host_group }, {
    bytes_rx = avg(dt.host.net.nic.bytes_rx),
    bytes_tx = avg(dt.host.net.nic.bytes_tx)
  }

| fieldsAdd hostGroupName = if(isNull(entityName(dt.entity.host_group)),  "No group assigned", else:  entityName(dt.entity.host_group))
| filter in(hostGroupName, $HostGroups) 
| fieldsAdd intervalSeconds = toLong(interval) / 1000000000
| fieldsAdd trafficVolume = ((arraySum(bytes_rx) + arraySum(bytes_tx))) * 8 * intervalSeconds
| summarize sum(trafficVolume), alias: traffic_gb

30.title: Avg Disk usage % / host
30.query:
timeseries  disk_usg=avg(dt.host.disk.used.percent), by: { host.name, dt.entity.host, dt.entity.host_group }
| fieldsAdd dt.entity.host_group.name = entityName(dt.entity.host_group)  
| fieldsAdd hostGroupName = if(isNull( dt.entity.host_group.name),  "No group assigned", else:  dt.entity.host_group.name)
| fieldsAdd disk_avg = arrayAvg(disk_usg) 
| fields host.name, disk_avg, dt.entity.host
| sort disk_avg desc

32.title: Files Sent
32.query:
timeseries {sent.count=sum(iis.total.files.sent.count),received.count=sum(iis.total.files.received.count)}
| fieldsAdd totalFiles=sent.count[]+received.count[]
| fieldsRemove sent.count,received.count 
| fieldsAdd metricName = "Total Files Sent"

33.title: Cross Site Synch - Duration

34.title: Files Sent
34.query: timeseries { sum(iis.total.files.sent.count), value.A = sum(iis.total.files.sent.count, scalar: true) }

39.title: Cross Site Synch - Duration

40.title: SMS Exec Network Throughput
40.query:
//queryId=PerformanceAnalyticsProcessesNetworkIncomingTraffic
 timeseries m1=avg(dt.process.network.bytes_rx), by:{dt.entity.process_group_instance}, filter:dt.entity.process_group_instance=="PROCESS_GROUP_INSTANCE-716757DB0B7A4549"
            | fieldsAdd m1=m1[]*8 | fieldsAdd metricName = "Bytes received"
| append[//queryId=PerformanceAnalyticsProcessesNetworkOutgoingTraffic
 timeseries m1=avg(dt.process.network.bytes_tx), by:{dt.entity.process_group_instance}, filter:dt.entity.process_group_instance=="PROCESS_GROUP_INSTANCE-716757DB0B7A4549"
            | fieldsAdd m1=m1[]*8 | fieldsAdd metricName = "Bytes sent"]

42.title: Active Clients Per Day - 7d (unique IPs)
42.query:
fetch logs, from: now()-7d
| filter not startsWith(content, "#")
| filter matchesPhrase(content, "/CCM_System") 
  or matchesPhrase(content, "/CCM_System_WindowsAuth")
  or matchesPhrase(content, "/SMS_MP")
  or matchesPhrase(content, "/CCM_Incoming")
// Preserve timestamp BEFORE parse
| fieldsAdd log_day = bin(timestamp, 1d)
| parse content, "DATA SPACE DATA SPACE DATA SPACE DATA SPACE DATA:cs_uri_stem SPACE DATA SPACE DATA SPACE DATA SPACE DATA:c_ip SPACE DATA:user_agent SPACE"
// Only keep records where parse actually worked
| filter isNotNull(c_ip)
| filter startsWith(user_agent, "SMS")
| makeTimeSeries active_clients = countDistinct(c_ip), by: log_day, interval:1d
| sort log_day asc

43.title: Policy Request Failure Rate (per hour)
43.query:
// Policy Request Failure Rate (per hour)
fetch logs, from: now()-24h
| filter not startsWith(content, "#")
| filter matchesPhrase(content, "/CCM_System")
  or matchesPhrase(content, "/CCM_System_WindowsAuth")
| fieldsAdd log_hour = bin(timestamp, 1h)
| parse content, "DATA SPACE DATA SPACE DATA SPACE DATA SPACE DATA:cs_uri_stem SPACE DATA SPACE DATA SPACE DATA SPACE DATA:c_ip SPACE DATA:user_agent SPACE DATA SPACE DATA:sc_status SPACE"
| filter isNotNull(sc_status)
| fieldsAdd status_int = toLong(sc_status)
| summarize
    total        = count(),
    success      = countIf(status_int == 200),
    client_error = countIf(status_int >= 400 and status_int < 500),
    server_error = countIf(status_int >= 500),
    by: log_hour
| fieldsAdd failure_rate_pct = round((toDouble(client_error + server_error) / toDouble(total)) * 100, decimals:1)
| sort log_hour asc

44.title: Policy Request Failure Rate - 24h (per hour)
44.query:
// Policy Request Failure Rate (per hour)
fetch logs, from: now()-24h
| filter not startsWith(content, "#")
| filter matchesPhrase(content, "/CCM_System")
  or matchesPhrase(content, "/CCM_System_WindowsAuth")
| fieldsAdd log_hour = bin(timestamp, 1h)
| parse content, "DATA SPACE DATA SPACE DATA SPACE DATA SPACE DATA:cs_uri_stem SPACE DATA SPACE DATA SPACE DATA SPACE DATA:c_ip SPACE DATA:user_agent SPACE DATA SPACE DATA:sc_status SPACE"
| filter isNotNull(sc_status)
| fieldsAdd status_int = toLong(sc_status)
| makeTimeseries 
    total        = count(),
    success      = countIf(status_int == 200),
    client_error = countIf(status_int >= 400 and status_int < 500),
    server_error = countIf(status_int >= 500),
    by: log_hour, interval: 1h
| sort log_hour asc

45.title: Device Count By Version (24h)
45.query:
// Client Version Distribution
fetch logs, from: now()-1d
| filter not startsWith(content, "#")
| filter matchesPhrase(content, "SMS+CCM") or matchesPhrase(content, "SMS CCM")
| parse content, "DATA SPACE DATA SPACE DATA SPACE DATA SPACE DATA:cs_uri_stem SPACE DATA SPACE DATA SPACE DATA SPACE DATA:c_ip SPACE DATA:raw_user_agent SPACE"
| fieldsAdd user_agent_clean = replaceString(raw_user_agent, "+", " ")
| parse user_agent_clean, "'SMS CCM ' DATA:sccm_version"
| filter isNotNull(sccm_version)
| summarize 
    device_count = countDistinct(c_ip),
    by: sccm_version
| sort device_count desc

46.title: Last seen > 21 days
46.query:
// Last Seen Per Client (for staleness / heartbeat tracking)
fetch logs, from: now()-40d
| filter not startsWith(content, "#")
| filter matchesPhrase(content, "/CCM_System") 
  or matchesPhrase(content, "/SMS_MP")
| filter matchesPhrase(content, "SMS+CCM") or matchesPhrase(content, "SMS CCM")
| parse content, "DATA SPACE DATA SPACE DATA SPACE DATA SPACE DATA:cs_uri_stem SPACE DATA SPACE DATA SPACE DATA SPACE DATA:c_ip SPACE DATA:user_agent SPACE"
| summarize last_seen = max(timestamp), by: c_ip
| fieldsAdd days_since_contact = toLong((now() - last_seen) / 86400000000000)
| fieldsAdd c_ip = "masked_ip"
| filter days_since_contact > 21
| sort days_since_contact desc

47.title: Last seen > 14 days
47.query:
// Last Seen Per Client (for staleness / heartbeat tracking)
fetch logs, from: now()-40d
| filter not startsWith(content, "#")
| filter matchesPhrase(content, "/CCM_System") 
  or matchesPhrase(content, "/SMS_MP")
| filter matchesPhrase(content, "SMS+CCM") or matchesPhrase(content, "SMS CCM")
| parse content, "DATA SPACE DATA SPACE DATA SPACE DATA SPACE DATA:cs_uri_stem SPACE DATA SPACE DATA SPACE DATA SPACE DATA:c_ip SPACE DATA:user_agent SPACE"
| summarize last_seen = max(timestamp), by: c_ip
| fieldsAdd days_since_contact = toLong((now() - last_seen) / 86400000000000)
| filter days_since_contact > 14 and days_since_contact <= 21
| fieldsAdd c_ip = "masked_ip"
| sort days_since_contact desc

48.title: Last seen > 7 days
48.query:
// Last Seen Per Client (for staleness / heartbeat tracking)
fetch logs, from: now()-40d
| filter not startsWith(content, "#")
| filter matchesPhrase(content, "/CCM_System") 
  or matchesPhrase(content, "/SMS_MP")
| filter matchesPhrase(content, "SMS+CCM") or matchesPhrase(content, "SMS CCM")
| parse content, "DATA SPACE DATA SPACE DATA SPACE DATA SPACE DATA:cs_uri_stem SPACE DATA SPACE DATA SPACE DATA SPACE DATA:c_ip SPACE DATA:user_agent SPACE"
| summarize last_seen = max(timestamp), by: c_ip
| fieldsAdd days_since_contact = toLong((now() - last_seen) / 86400000000000)
| filter days_since_contact > 7 and days_since_contact <= 14
| fieldsAdd c_ip = "masked_ip"
| sort days_since_contact desc

49.title: Last seen clients by IP Last 40 days
49.query:
fetch logs, from: now()-40d
| filter not startsWith(content, "#")
| filter matchesPhrase(content, "/CCM_System") 
  or matchesPhrase(content, "/SMS_MP")
| filter matchesPhrase(content, "SMS+CCM") or matchesPhrase(content, "SMS CCM")
| parse content, "DATA SPACE DATA SPACE DATA SPACE DATA SPACE DATA:cs_uri_stem SPACE DATA SPACE DATA SPACE DATA SPACE DATA:c_ip SPACE DATA:user_agent SPACE"
| summarize last_seen = max(timestamp), by: c_ip
| fieldsAdd days_since_contact = toLong((now() - last_seen) / 86400000000000)
| filter days_since_contact > 7
| fieldsAdd bucket = if(days_since_contact > 21, "21+ days",
                   else: if(days_since_contact > 14, "14-21 days",
                   else: "7-14 days"))
| summarize client_count = count(), by: bucket
| sort bucket asc
